Dear Valued Business Partner,

Please note that the fibre services in Rhodesfield Free Standing Houses, Kempton Park have been restored. 

Please contact your Dedicated Key Account Agent if you have any further queries or your client/s are still experiencing connectivity issues in the restored area.
